title: Backlog (.context/backlog.yaml)
description: Schema for the machine-readable task backlog dispatched into GitHub issues by .github/workflows/backlog-to-issues.yml.

entries.description: Ordered list of backlog entries. Each entry becomes at most one GitHub issue.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for this entry. Used as the dedup key and emitted in the issue body footer as <!-- backlog-entry-id: <id> -->.

labels.description: Additional issue labels (added on top of copilot:ready and from-backlog).

depends_on.description: Entry ids this entry depends on. Dispatch is skipped until each listed entry has `issue:` set AND that issue is in the closed state.

auto_assign.description: When true (default) the issue is created with the copilot:ready label so it enters the gated assignment workflow. When false the issue is created without copilot:ready and held for human review.

body.description: Issue body. If omitted and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, expand-backlog-entry.md fills it in. If omitted and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is missing, the dispatch workflow does NOT create the issue.

acceptance_criteria.description: Bullet list rendered as a Markdown checklist appended to the issue body. Same fill-in rules as `body`.

issue.description: Filled in by the dispatch workflow after the issue is created. Do not set by hand.
